title: Standing Stone
flavor: A lichen-crusted dolmen hums with old power. The Sídhe do not give freely.

options.label: Offer HP (20)
options.desc: Sacrifice 20 HP for a random boon.

title: Sacred Well
flavor: A holy well bubbles up between the stones, its waters blessed by the old gods.

options.label: Fill your flask
options.desc: Heal 25 HP and gain +2% Max HP regen per tick.

title: The Fallen Fian
flavor: A warrior of the Fianna lies here, spear still in hand, felled far from Tara.

options.label: Take their boon
options.desc: Absorb the power of a fallen hero.

title: The Púca's Bargain
flavor: A shape shifts in the shadows — the Púca offers a bargain, as it always does, at a price.

options.label: Refuse the voice
options.desc: Nothing happens. Some deals aren't worth making.
options.resultMsg: You refuse the Púca's offer. It shrieks and dissolves into mist.

title: The Ogham Stone
flavor: Ancient ogham notches catch the light, whispering half-forgotten lore.

title: Fomorian Plunder
flavor: A raiders' stash, abandoned in haste. The Fomorians left in a hurry.

options.label: Grab quickly
options.desc: 50/50: gain 2000 gold OR trigger a trap (−30 HP).

title: Font of Danu
flavor: Runes of the Tuatha Dé Danann glow faintly, charged with Otherworld power.

options.label: Purify
options.desc: Cure all status effects and gain poison immunity.

title: Fomorian Armory
flavor: Barbed iron weapons of the sea-raiders, still stained dark.

options.label: Take the cursed blade
options.desc: +8 ATK — but suffer 3 turns of poison.

options.label: Walk away
options.desc: Some power is not worth the price.
options.resultMsg: You leave the Fomorian iron untouched.

title: Echo of the Fili
flavor: A fractured echo of a poet-seer lingers, reciting fragments of forgotten verse.
